overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a black sports car driving through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The vehicle navigates through multi-lane streets lined with towering glass skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and futuristic billboards while encountering light traffic and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with hotel and corporate signage

agents.ego_description: cruising straight through downtown street observing neon signage and tall buildings

entered.detail: large illuminated hotel sign with blue neon letters on building facade
tall modern glass buildings with illuminated windows towering over street
corporate signage with white lettering on dark building
large glowing blue holographic figure displayed on building side
orange and white striped construction barriers lining left side of road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a black sports car driving straight through a neon-lit downtown street. The HO hotel sign glows on the right while the Kiroshi corporate sign appears on the left. Tall glass skyscrapers tower overhead, blocking the sky, and orange construction barriers line the left side of the multi-lane asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection and commercial street with passing traffic

events.description: vehicle makes right turn at intersection with crosswalk
yellow sports car passes in opposite direction on left side

agents.ego_description: navigating right turn at intersection then accelerating through city streets

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving in opposite direction passes by quickly

entered.detail: zebra crossing lines marking pedestrian intersection
building with distinctive red illuminated exterior and large windows
small illuminated kiosk or food stand on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The car executes a right turn at an intersection, leaving the hotel sign behind. A yellow sports car passes in the opposite direction. The vehicle continues down a new street lined with commercial buildings featuring red facades and street vendor stalls, while the holographic statue remains visible but closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with Watson district signage and commercial plaza

events.description: approaching and navigating through large intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes
passing under overhead pedestrian bridge into covered roadway section

agents.ego_description: slowing for intersection then proceeding through crosswalk area

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at crosswalk near building entrance

entered.detail: large red illuminated sign reading 'Watson' indicating district boundary
elevated walkway crossing over the street connecting buildings
cluster of commercial structures with bright signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a major intersection marked by yellow crosswalk stripes and the illuminated Watson district sign on the right. Pedestrians wait at the crosswalk as the car navigates through, then passes under an overhead pedestrian bridge into a more commercial plaza area with dense digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with dedicated blue bike lane and dense neon advertisements

events.description: entering street section with distinctive blue painted bike lane on left

agents.ego_description: cruising through commercial district with dense signage and blue bike lane

entered.detail: distinctive bright blue painted dedicated bicycle lane on left side of road
tree with pink illuminated blossoms on sidewalk
concentrated cluster of bright neon advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: Driving through a section featuring a distinctive blue bike lane on the left and cherry blossom trees with pink lighting. The Watson sign and overhead bridge recede as the car enters an area with dense neon signage on both sides, creating an immersive urban canyon of advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with holographic displays and elevated highway structures

events.description: approaching busy intersection with multiple vehicles and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: driving through dense neon district toward next intersection with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan crossing intersection ahead of ego vehicle

entered.detail: large elevated roadway or monorail track spanning across the street ahead
dense grouping of floating holographic displays and bright neon signs

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the car driving through the densest part of the neon district, with massive holographic advertisements and elevated highway structures looming ahead. The blue bike lane ends as the vehicle approaches another busy intersection with moderate traffic and pedestrians visible on the sidewalks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit downtown corridor that transitions from a skyscraper-lined thoroughfare into a dense commercial plaza. It begins with a black sports car driving straight past glowing hotel and corporate signs, flanked by towering glass buildings and orange construction barriers. As the vehicle executes a right turn at an intersection, the scene shifts toward a street lined with red-facaded commercial buildings and vendor stalls, passing a yellow sports car moving in the opposite direction. The camera then follows the car as it approaches a major intersection marked by yellow crosswalks and a Watson district sign, navigating past waiting pedestrians. Finally, the vehicle passes under an overhead pedestrian bridge, emerging into a vibrant plaza area dominated by dense digital billboards.

The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-lit urban corridor that evolves from a stylized street with floral accents into a dense, towering canyon of holographic advertisements. It begins by passing a blue bike lane and pink-lit cherry blossom trees, with the Watson sign and an overhead bridge receding in the rearview. As the car pushes forward, the environment shifts into an immersive urban canyon where dense neon signage crowds both sides of the road. The scene then expands into the heart of the neon district, where massive holograms and elevated highway structures loom overhead. Finally, the blue bike lane disappears as the vehicle approaches a busy intersection filled with moderate traffic and pedestrians lining the sidewalks.
